name: ERNIE 4.5 VL 424B-A47B
archDisplay: Multimodal heterogeneous MoE, 128 experts (64 text + 64 vision), 8 active per modality, 54 layers
note: Largest open ERNIE 4.5 release; supports thinking/non-thinking modes, with Baidu claiming near-o1 results on MathVista, MMMU and VisualPuzzle.
tpsNote: 424B total / 47B active multimodal MoE needs roughly 1TB VRAM at FP16 and stays far beyond a single RTX 4090 even at 4-bit.
